overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character running through a bioluminescent underground cavern with teal lighting and snow-covered ground. The character approaches a wooden tribal structure with warm torchlight before continuing into an open snowy woodland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with teal bioluminescent lighting

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the narrow canyon, navigating between rock walls and snow patches

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon passage
tall rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon passage
ground covered with patches of snow and white mineral deposits
glowing teal rock formations emitting ambient light
tall standalone rock pillar rising from the canyon floor
glowing teal plants growing along the canyon walls
cluster of jagged rocks and boulders in the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow rocky canyon illuminated by teal bioluminescent light. Snow patches cover the ground between tall rock walls and stone formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden tribal outpost with warm torchlight

events.description: warm orange torchlight from the wooden outpost becomes visible ahead, contrasting with the teal ambient light
arriving at the wooden tribal outpost structure with scaffolding and gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden outpost while navigating around rocks and vegetation

entered.detail: large wooden tribal building with multiple levels and platforms
warm orange glowing torches mounted on the wooden structure
wooden support beams and platforms attached to the outpost
tall pine trees with glowing teal foliage near the outpost
archway entrance made of wooden logs with decorative elements

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden tribal outpost built into the cave, with warm torchlight contrasting the teal ambient glow. The structure features wooden scaffolding, an archway entrance, and is surrounded by bioluminescent trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy woodland with scattered pine trees

events.description: passing the wooden outpost and entering the open snowy woodland area with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: running through the open area away from the outpost, navigating between snow-covered trees and rocky terrain

entered.detail: scattered pine trees with snow-laden branches throughout the open area
large boulders and rock outcrops dotting the right side of the path
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and elevation changes
small sparse trees growing in the center distance
sloped rocky hill rising in the far right background

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the outpost into a more open snowy area dotted with pine trees and rocky outcrops. The left canyon wall recedes into the distance as the character continues deeper into the cavern system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bioluminescent canyon that transitions from a narrow rocky corridor into an open snowy woodland. It begins with the character running through a tight passage of tall rock walls and stone formations, where the ground is dappled with patches of snow under a teal ambient glow. As the path widens, the scene shifts toward a wooden tribal outpost built into the cave, where warm torchlight creates a sharp contrast against the surrounding bioluminescent trees and scaffolding. The camera then follows the character past the archway entrance and into a more expansive snowy area dotted with pine trees and rocky outcrops. Finally, the left canyon wall recedes into the distance as the movement continues deeper into the cavern system.
